description: LLM uses the workflow tool with registerPhase to scan files and synthesize

criteria.name: tool_invoked
criteria.description: Workflow tool was actually called (output shows execution, not just description)
criteria.pass_condition: Output contains 'Workflow ... completed with' indicating the tool ran. Not a hypothetical description.

criteria.name: uses_registerPhase
criteria.description: Script uses registerPhase() for top-level phase declarations
criteria.pass_condition: Script declares phases via registerPhase(), not bare phase() + agent() at top level.

criteria.name: correct_agent_options
criteria.description: Agents use model refs (not weight/stream), have unique labels, and use read tools
criteria.pass_condition: Agents specify model: with a valid model ref. Each has a distinct label. Read tool is specified for file operations.

criteria.name: handoff_within_phases
criteria.description: handoff() used only inside phase bodies, not between phases
criteria.pass_condition: If handoff is used, it's inside a registerPhase body. Cross-phase data flows through registerPhase pipes.

criteria.name: all_phases_completed
criteria.description: All declared phases ran and their agents finished
criteria.pass_condition: Output shows all phases with agents in 'done' status. No 'error' or 'failed' agents.

criteria.name: sensible_results
criteria.description: The synthesis summarizes findings about all three files
criteria.pass_condition: Results mention auth, billing, utils files. Not empty, generic, or unrelated to the task.
